entries.claim_text: Byte Latent Transformer: Patches Scale Better Than Tokens
entries.quoted_snippet: Byte Latent Transformer: Patches Scale Better Than Tokens

entries.claim_text: BLT 由 Local Encoder、Latent Transformer、Local Decoder 三個模組組成
entries.quoted_snippet: comprises three modules, a lightweight

entries.claim_text: 各種 patching 方案的比較
entries.quoted_snippet: Patching schemes group bytes in different ways, each leading to a different number of resulting patches

entries.claim_text: 例句逐 byte 的熵與 patch 邊界
entries.quoted_snippet: plots the entropy $H(x_i)$ of each byte

entries.claim_text: 唯一的例外是 tokenization
entries.quoted_snippet: trained almost entirely end-to-end, except for tokenization

entries.claim_text: 切分的依據是下一個 byte 的預測熵
entries.quoted_snippet: allocating more compute and model capacity where increased data complexity demands it

entries.claim_text: 把 embedding table 相對 Llama 2 放大 4 倍
entries.quoted_snippet: increasing the size of its embedding table 4x compared to

entries.claim_text: patch 的數量直接決定了主要的 FLOP 開銷
entries.quoted_snippet: the number of patches directly determines the bulk of the compute expended in terms of

entries.claim_text: 資料驅動地找出「高不確定性」的下一 byte 位置
entries.quoted_snippet: we instead take a data-driven approach to identify high uncertainty next-byte predictions

entries.claim_text: H(x_i) = \sum_{v \in \mathcal{V}}
entries.quoted_snippet: H(x_i) = \sum_{v \in \mathcal{V}} p_{e}(x_i=v|\pmb{x}_{<i}) \log p_{e}(x_i=v|\pmb{x}_{<i})

entries.claim_text: 全域門檻（global threshold）
entries.quoted_snippet: finds points above a global entropy threshold

entries.claim_text: H(x_t) - H(x_{t-1}) > \theta_r
entries.quoted_snippet: - H(x_{t-1}) > \theta_r

entries.claim_text: 100M 參數、14 層
entries.quoted_snippet: 100M parameters, 14 layers, and a hidden dimensionality of 512

entries.claim_text: incremental patching
entries.quoted_snippet: needs to decide whether the current step in the byte sequence is at a patch boundary

entries.claim_text: f_p(\pmb{x}_{<i}) = f_p(\pmb{x})_{<i}
entries.quoted_snippet: f_p(\pmb{x}_{<i}) = f_p(\pmb{x})_{<i}

entries.claim_text: entropy patching 相對 tokenization
entries.quoted_snippet: is not an incremental patching scheme as the same prefix can be tokenized differently

entries.claim_text: global 模型消耗絕大部分的 FLOP
entries.quoted_snippet: This model consumes the bulk of the \flop{}s during pre-training as well as inference

entries.claim_text: 500,000 個 hash、單一 hash 函數
entries.quoted_snippet: 500,000$ hashes with a single hash function

entries.claim_text: e_i = x_i + \sum
entries.quoted_snippet: E_{n}^{hash}(\text{Hash}(g_{i,n}))

entries.claim_text: encoder 端以 patch 表徵為 query
entries.quoted_snippet: patch representations as queries, and byte representations as keys/values

entries.claim_text: 與 tokenizer 無關的困惑度
entries.quoted_snippet: a tokenizer independent version of perplexity

entries.claim_text: \frac{\mathcal{L}_{CE}(\pmb{x})}{\ln(2)\cdot n_{\text{bytes}}}
entries.quoted_snippet: \frac{\mathcal{L}_{CE}(\pmb{x})}{\ln(2)\cdot n_{\text{bytes}}}

entries.claim_text: 當作 0-FLOP 操作
entries.quoted_snippet: becoming a 0-\flop{} operation

entries.claim_text: `G` 與 `e` 的熵超過 $\theta_g$
entries.quoted_snippet: the entropies of ``G'' and ``e'' in ``George R.R. Martin'' exceed

entries.claim_text: 換來論文宣稱的近 50% 推論 FLOP 節省
entries.quoted_snippet: using a patch size of 8 bytes would lead to nearly 50\% inference \flop{} savings

entries.claim_text: 以相同 FLOP 預算訓練的三個 8B 模型
entries.quoted_snippet: All three models are trained with an equivalent \flop{} budget

entries.claim_text: BLT-Entropy 在 7 項中有 4 項勝過同資料量的 Llama 3
entries.quoted_snippet: outperforms the \llama{} 3 model on 4 out of 7 tasks

entries.claim_text: 字元層級（character-level）任務
entries.quoted_snippet: as well as awareness of characters, both English and multi-lingual

entries.claim_text: 高出 25 分以上，拼寫（spelling）任務甚至到 99.9%
entries.quoted_snippet: more than 25 points on this benchmark

entries.claim_text: 在固定推論 FLOP 預算下同時放大模型與 patch size
entries.quoted_snippet: simultaneously increase model size and patch size while maintaining the same

entries.claim_text: 這些算力可以拿去把 global latent transformer 養得更大
entries.quoted_snippet: reallocated to grow the size of the global latent transformer, because it is run less often

entries.claim_text: byte 模型贏在這裡幾乎是定義上的必然
entries.quoted_snippet: This benchmark poses a significant challenge for most tokenizer-based models

entries.claim_text: 這個 scaling law 是給 BPE transformer 算的，對 BLT 可能導致次佳的配置
entries.quoted_snippet: these scaling laws were calculated for BPE-level transformers and may lead to suboptimal

entries.claim_text: static patching 來自 MegaByte、space patching 來自 SpaceByte
entries.quoted_snippet: We closely follow the input cross-attention module of the Perceiver architecture

entries.claim_text: 是一個理論上限
entries.quoted_snippet: our implementations may yet not be at parity with tokenizer-based models in terms of wall-clock time

entries.claim_text: 用 220B tokens 就把 MMLU 拉到 63.7
